items.name: CredentialStore class + frontmatter schema
validation: CredentialStore.resolveFlat(domain) returns only granted keys in strict mode ✓
Legacy mode (no credentials config) returns all keys ✓
CredentialGrant, CredentialsSchema, ToolOperationSchema added to manifest.ts ✓
allowedDomains added to SandboxSchema ✓

items.name: Wire CredentialStore into createAgentServers
validation: createAgentServers accepts CredentialStore instead of raw agentEnv ✓
Web tools receive store.resolveFlat('web') ✓
Shell tools receive store.toFlatEnv() (filtered by buildShellEnv) ✓
mergeExternalMcpServers uses credentialStore.toFlatEnv() for env resolution ✓

items.name: Audit logging on credential resolution
validation: CredentialStore.resolveFlat logs domain, grants, and keys when logger provided ✓
Uses LogCategory 'tool' with event 'credentials.resolved' ✓

items.name: Egress proxy (domain allowlist filter)
validation: EgressFilter validates URLs against allowlist ✓
Supports exact match and wildcard (*.domain.com) patterns ✓
Throws on non-allowlisted domains ✓
Case-insensitive matching ✓

items.name: Wire egress proxy into web and A2A tools
validation: web_fetch validates against egress filter before fetch ✓
web_search validates against egress filter before fetch ✓
A2A tools validate against egress filter (even for registered URLs) ✓
EgressFilter is optional — tools work without it ✓

items.name: Headless `run` subcommand
validation: mastersof-ai run <agent> 'message' subcommand implemented ✓
Structured exit codes (0=success, 1=error) ✓
Passes credentialsConfig, allowedDomains, toolOperations through ✓

items.name: runs.jsonl logging in run mode
validation: Appends JSON line to ~/.mastersof-ai/state/{agent}/runs.jsonl ✓
Record contains timestamp, agent, message, exitCode, durationMs ✓
Best-effort logging (failure doesn't block run) ✓

items.name: Per-user tool deny in access.yaml
validation: tools_deny field added to AccessEntry and AccessUser ✓
Parsed from access.yaml in loadAccessConfig ✓
canUseTool Layer 3 checks userToolsDeny ✓
Matches full tool name, suffix, or domain segment ✓

items.name: canUseTool operation allowlist
validation: toolOperations schema added to AgentFrontmatterSchema ✓
canUseTool Layer 4 checks operation against allow/deny lists ✓
Extracts operation from input.operation/method/action ✓
Passed through buildOptions from frontmatter ✓

items.name: Restrict external MCP in serve mode
validation: Command-based MCP servers blocked in ALL serve mode sessions ✓
Previous check (only without sandbox) replaced with unconditional block ✓
URI-based MCP servers still allowed in serve mode ✓
sandboxPolicy param removed from mergeExternalMcpServers ✓

items.name: credentials migrate CLI command
validation: mastersof-ai credentials migrate [agent] subcommand implemented ✓
Reads .env keys, outputs YAML credentials block ✓
Excludes DOTENV_PRIVATE_KEY ✓

items.name: Docs for credentials and agent authoring
validation: docs/credentials.md: format reference with schema, examples, migration ✓
docs/agent-security.md: authoring guide covering all W2 features ✓

items.name: Tests for CredentialStore + egress proxy
validation: 15 CredentialStore tests: legacy mode, strict mode, edge cases ✓
14 EgressFilter tests: exact match, wildcard, edge cases ✓
Test files added to package.json test scripts ✓
All 160 unit tests pass ✓
